citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Choosing the most likely ending for a story is an example of commonsense reasoning, which requires knowledge about people and things, and how they behave, that computers may not have.
